% IMRaD Research Article Template
% Generated by Researcher plugin: manuscript-setup skill
% Compile with: scripts/latex-compile.py (uses tectonic, latexmk, or pdflatex, whichever is installed)

\documentclass[12pt,a4paper]{article}

% --- Core packages ---
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}

% --- Page layout ---
\usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}
\usepackage{setspace}
\doublespacing

% --- Math ---
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb,amsfonts}

% --- Figures and tables ---
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{multirow}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{subcaption}
\usepackage{float}

% --- Citations ---
\usepackage[numbers]{natbib}
% For APA style, replace with:
% \usepackage[round,authoryear]{natbib}

% --- Cross-references and links ---
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=blue,
    citecolor=blue,
    urlcolor=blue
}

% --- ORCID marks ---
% Dependency-free: a small linked "iD" marker after the author's name, drawn with hyperref
% (already loaded), so the template compiles anywhere without an extra package. An author with
% an ORCID gets \orcid{0000-0002-1825-0097}; an author without one simply omits it and nothing
% is rendered. For the official green ORCID logo instead, add \usepackage{orcidlink} and use
% \orcidlink{0000-0002-1825-0097} (fetched on demand by tectonic; shipped with recent TeX Live,
% MiKTeX, and MacTeX).
\newcommand{\orcid}[1]{\href{https://orcid.org/#1}{\textsuperscript{\scriptsize\,iD}}}

% --- Algorithms (uncomment if needed) ---
% \usepackage[ruled,vlined]{algorithm2e}
% \usepackage{algorithmic}

% --- TikZ (uncomment if needed) ---
% \usepackage{tikz}
% \usepackage{pgfplots}
% \pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}

% --- Revision markup (uncomment for tracked changes) ---
% \usepackage[markup=underlined]{changes}

% --- Metadata ---
\title{TITLE}
\author{
    First Author\orcid{0000-0002-1825-0097}\textsuperscript{1,*} \and
    Second Author\textsuperscript{2}
    \\[1em]
    \small\textsuperscript{1}Department, University, City, Country \\
    \small\textsuperscript{2}Department, Institution, City, Country \\
    \small\textsuperscript{*}Corresponding author: \href{mailto:email@example.com}{email@example.com}
}
\date{}

\begin{document}

\maketitle

\input{abstract}
\input{introduction}
\input{methods}
\input{results}
\input{discussion}
\input{conclusion}
\input{acknowledgments}

\bibliographystyle{plainnat}
\bibliography{references/library}

% \appendix
% \input{appendix}

\end{document}
